description.short: Super OYO Capital O 1630 Hotel Syariah Ring Road puts two travelers close to Banda Aceh’s historic mosques, museums and lively markets, with coastal parks a short ride away. Rooms come with complimentary bottled water, plush towels, toiletries and a flat-screen TV; bright showers and street or garden views help guests refresh after exploring. Practical amenities include 24-hour check-in and round-the-clock room service, on-demand food delivery and boutique shops on site for added convenience. A smart, comfortable base for culturally rich days by the sea. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Super OYO Capital O 1630 Hotel Syariah Ring Road
comments.responseText:
Dear Ikrammul,

Terima kasih banyak atas ulasan dan rating positifnya! Kami senang mendengar bahwa Anda merasa cukup nyaman selama 3 malam menginap di Super OYO Capital O 1630 Hotel Syariah Ring Road. Senang juga mengetahui Anda menyukai kebersihan kamar, AC, water heater, koneksi WiFi, serta lokasi strategis hotel kami.

Kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan terkait tombol flush tank yang hilang. Tim kami sudah menindaklanjuti agar segera diperbaiki.

Saran Anda mengenai pemilihan tipe kamar sangat bermanfaat, dan kami harap bisa menyambut Anda kembali di masa mendatang dengan pengalaman yang lebih nyaman lagi.

Salam hangat,
Tim
Manajemen Super OYO Capital O 1630 Hotel Syariah Ring Road
comments.reviewComments:
I stayed here for 3 nights, the place is comfortable. It's just a bit tiring to climb the stairs. So for those of you who are elderly, just choose the deluxe room because it is located downstairs. 
It's clean, the AC is cool, the water heater works well, the Wi-Fi is fast, and there is a water dispenser on each floor.
The hotel area is quite strategic, there are KFC and Reechese on the left and right, a pizza restaurant in front, and a bus terminal also in front of the hotel. Basically, everything can be accessed with just a few steps. 
The only downside is the flush tank button in the toilet because the button is missing.
comments.originalComment:
Nginep disini 3 malem, tempatnya nyaman. Cuman agak capek aja sih kalau naik tangga. So buat kalian yg jompo pilih deluxe aja yah karna dia berada dibawah. 
Bersih, AC dingin, water heater berfungsi dengan baik, Wifinya kenceng, Disediain dispenser air tiap lantai.
Untuk area hotel cukup strategis, dikiri kanan ada KFC dan Reechese, depannya ada restoran pizza, terminal bus juga berada di depan hotel. Intinya semua bisa di akses dengan sedikit langkah aja. 
Yg minus cuman tombol flush tank closetnya aja karna tombolnya ilang.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: Super OYO Capital O 1630 Hotel Syariah Ring Road
comments.reviewNegatives: Di kaunter saya kena top up duit Rm25..I don't understand why booking.com rate this hotel 7.2..i got a third floor room with 20kg luggage,no elevator..bathroom leaking..towel berbau,warna kuning..lantai melekit,aircond X servis,saya tido malam dah berpeluh..Minta dgn staff nk tukar bilik..tapi X dpt..terpaksa hadap..
comments.reviewPositives: Had a lot restaurant near hotel at night
